heroHeadline: Iran Rejects Trump's 15-Point Plan; Issues 5-Point Counterproposal as War Rages
heroSubtitle: Tehran dismisses US ceasefire proposal as 'maximalist, unreasonable'; IDF strikes IRGC HQ and cruise missile sites in Tehran; IEA calls Hormuz closure 'greatest energy security challenge in history'
footerNote: Data updated 2026-03-26. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, Fars News, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, International Energy Agency.
